name: writerclock
description: A dependency-free literary clock with an exact-time, review-status-labeled quote for every minute.

scripts.check: npm test && npm run audit:data && npm run check:static && npm run check:android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:static && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
